title: container-field-in-allowlist parameters
description: Parameters for generating a Rego policy that checks a container field value against a parameter-supplied allowlist.

ValueExpr.description: Rego expression that extracts the value from 'container' (e.g., container.securityContext.procMount)

FieldName.description: Human-readable field name for violation messages

ParamKey.description: Key in input.parameters that holds the allowed values list
